svg.text: ESP32 + two I2C sensors. Only 8 jumper wires total. Pi and smart plug are WiFi only.
No wires to ESP32 -- they talk over WiFi
Just plug humidifier in -- no wiring needed
Tip: Both sensors share the same I2C bus -- different addresses (0x44 and 0x23) so no conflict. Dashed lines above show the shared connections.
In practice you can daisy-chain: ESP32 pin --> SHT31 pin --> BH1750 pin (use the same wire for both).
